name: Chicken in Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Wash and dry the chicken. Sprinkle the cavity with half a teaspoon of salt and pepper.
3. Stuff the chicken with savory stuffing.
4. Tie the legs together.
5. Brown all sides in margarine in a deep baking pan.
6. Add bouillon and potatoes, then bake covered for 30 minutes.
7. Add peas and carrots, and sprinkle with the remaining half teaspoon of salt. Cover again.
8. Bake for an additional 30 minutes.
